description: Property Listing contract for Rentars — manages on-chain property listings with create, read, update, and status management. Each listing is owned by an Address and can only be mutated by its owner.

functions.name: create_listing
functions.description: Create a new property listing. Returns the new listing's auto-incremented ID. Panics if price_per_night is zero or negative, or if title is empty.

inputs.name: owner
inputs.description: The Stellar address that owns and controls this listing.

inputs.name: title
inputs.description: Human-readable listing title. Must not be empty.

inputs.name: price_per_night
inputs.description: Nightly price in USDC stroops (1 USDC = 10,000,000 stroops). Must be greater than 0.

outputs.description: The newly created listing ID (auto-incremented, starts at 1).

functions.name: get_listing
functions.description: Retrieve a listing by ID. Panics with 'Listing not found' if the ID does not exist.

functions.name: update_listing
functions.description: Update a listing's mutable fields (title, description, price_per_night). Only the original owner may call this. Panics if caller is not the owner, listing not found, or inputs are invalid.

inputs.name: caller
inputs.description: Must match the owner address recorded at creation time.

inputs.name: title
inputs.description: New title. Must not be empty.

inputs.name: price_per_night
inputs.description: New nightly price in USDC stroops. Must be greater than 0.

functions.name: update_status
functions.description: Update the status of a listing. Only the original owner may call this.

inputs.name: caller
inputs.description: Must match the owner address recorded at creation time.

functions.name: listing_count
functions.description: Return the total number of listings ever created.

outputs.description: Total listings created since contract deployment.

owner.description: Stellar address of the listing owner. Immutable after creation.

storage_keys.Listing(u64): PropertyListing — individual listing record keyed by listing ID
storage_keys.ListingCount: u64 — monotonic counter for listing ID generation

notes: Listing IDs are auto-incremented by the contract starting at 1.
The owner field is set at creation and cannot be changed via update_listing.
All new listings start with ListingStatus::Active.
price_per_night is stored in USDC stroops: 1 USDC = 10,000,000 stroops.
